'''Bellican''' was a judge sent to the [[Penumbra Spaceport]] for the trial of [[Roan Lands]] and [[Dona Telamark]] on the ''[[True Justice]]'', along with [[Oryon|Tomay Alcorn]], the attorney, and [[Sam Weller]], the law clerk. However, this was prevented when [[Fy-Tor-Ana|Solace]] impersonated him; also, [[Trever Flume]], as Weller, and [[Oryon]], as Alcorn, went with Solace.

{{Char-stub}}
